research_history_boundary.claim: exact-policy mechanical freeze, not a globally pristine market holdout; 2024+ remains sealed until pre-2024 performance and orthogonality gates pass

novelty_boundary.economic_axis: price-independent Bitcoin blockspace demand: transactor-paid fees rise relative to protocol issuance while transactions per main-chain block remain at or above their own baseline
not: BTC price momentum, reversal, extrema, wick, or volatility
hashrate, difficulty, hashprice, or miner capitulation
funding, premium, basis, OI, Kimchi, DXY, FX, REX, or Markov state

metric_semantics.FeeTotNtv: sum of transactor-paid fees; excludes newly issued units
metric_semantics.IssTotNtv: sum of newly issued native units
metric_semantics.BlkCnt: main-chain blocks created during the interval
metric_semantics.AssetEODCompletionTime: time at which EOD metrics were fully calculated

source_contract.revision_boundary: AssetEODCompletionTime enforces semantic publication latency and hashes freeze the downloaded vintage; live promotion requires forward-vintage parity because historical network metrics can revise
source_contract.excluded_for_leakage_risk: FlowInEx/FlowOutEx/SplyEx exchange-tag metrics are excluded because a point-in-time address-tag vintage archive is unavailable

causal_feature_contract.reference: component mean and sample standard deviation from the last 180 earlier observation dates whose available_at is strictly before the candidate available_at; require at least 120
causal_feature_contract.eligible: availability lag <=3 days, fee_share_z>=1.0, transaction_density_z>=0.0, and composite>=1.5
causal_feature_contract.event: first eligible observation after an ineligible observation

execution_contract.decision: only after the row's AssetEODCompletionTime available_at
execution_contract.earliest_tradable_open: first UTC five-minute bar open >= available_at
execution_contract.entry: one complete five-minute latency bar after earliest_tradable_open
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open 864 five-minute bars (three days) after entry
execution_contract.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle cash
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM, favorable-before-adverse held OHLC, funding, entry/exit/hypothetical liquidation costs

controls.direction_flip: primary clock, short side; diagnostic-only and never a repair or replacement
controls.fee_component_only: long on onset of fee_share_z>=1.5 without density or composite conditions
controls.density_component_only: long on onset of transaction_density_z>=1.5 without fee conditions
controls.low_fee_mirror: long on fee_share_z<=-1.0, density_z>=0.0, and mirrored composite<=-1.5
controls.stale_blockspace_7d: primary blockspace state delayed by seven observations
controls.one_bar_delayed_entry: primary side, entry one additional five-minute bar after primary
controls.year_stratified_random_clock: same yearly trade counts and three-day hold
controls.mechanism_rejection_rule: reject BFC-3 if fee-only, density-only, low-fee mirror, or stale control independently passes every primary gate

orthogonality_after_performance.comparison_set: all promoted/live/shadow sleeves frozen before BFC-3 outcomes open

rejection_contract: any support, performance, mechanism, or orthogonality failure rejects BFC-3 without changing formula, thresholds, side, latency, or hold
